prompt: Kita mau bikin campaign untuk Kelolain, platform HRIS enterprise. Target: HR manager di perusahaan 200+ karyawan. Butuh: 1) TikTok script 30 detik, 2) LinkedIn post, 3) email subject line + preview text. Key selling point: payroll yang tadinya 5 hari jadi 1 jam. Sudah dipakai 3.000+ perusahaan termasuk 5 BUMN.

assertions.name: linkedin-formal-register
assertions.description: LinkedIn section uses formal Anda register

assertions.name: has-social-proof
assertions.description: Includes social proof (user count or BUMN mention)

assertions.name: has-tiktok-hook
assertions.description: TikTok script has an attention hook element
